title: Senior Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
